name: docs-cockpit
description: Project dashboard (Kanban + Sprint + KPI) + tree-sidebar markdown browser + frontmatter validator in self-contained HTML files. Bilingual EN/中 toggle. 0.9.0 unifies the doc-writing spec: ships the **docs-cockpit-author** skill (canonical frontmatter schema + body conventions + cross-doc reference rules) and the **docs-cockpit lint** CLI (structured `error`/`warn`/`hint` issues with fix suggestions). Empty-docs modules show a copy-prompt CTA (Plan/RFC/Spec) that compiles a complete prompt for AI coding editors (Claude Code superpowers / gstack / Cursor / Codex / Continue / Aider).
